summary: V1.2 Topic Matching backend verification complete. All 40 pre-existing tests + 7 new contract tests pass (47/47). Live /api/audit and /api/audits/{id}/export endpoints verified over public ingress. No regressions: V1.1 heading extraction (3 tests) and well-optimised fixture (overall_score >= 75) intact. Frontend smoke skipped per scope (backend-only).

verified_contract_items._topic_match_unrelated_false: PASS (Spanish Residency Services vs Cheap Bed Sale)

critical_code_review_comments: scorer.py is 673 lines — past the recommended 700 LOC budget watermark. Consider splitting into per-area modules (url.py, meta.py, headings.py, content.py, images.py, schema.py, faq.py) before V1.3 to keep maintainability.

_GEO_NORMALISE is a hardcoded demonym table (20-ish entries). Document this is intentional for V1.2 (Phase 2 LLM will handle the long tail) — already noted in source comment. No action needed, just flagging for next iteration.
Stemmer drops trailing 'y' aggressively (residency -> residenc). This is fine for matching but ensure no other check uses _stem for display/logging where a non-word stub would look odd to users.

_topic_match threshold (80%) and partial threshold (60%) are intentional product decisions per agent-to-agent note — not flagged as a bug, only as a documented design choice future agents should not silently change.
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_v12_contract.py (new — explicit contract checklist mirroring review_request bullets)
seed_data_creation: None. Live API smoke created one audit doc for https://example.com via POST /api/audit (id=65abda3c-acd0-4693-be43-3d56bc47f644).
context_for_next_testing_agent: V1.2 topic-matching is fully green. New file /app/backend/tests/test_v12_contract.py is the contract checklist — keep it as a regression for future iterations. If touching scorer.py, re-run pytest + this contract file. Frontend smoke (/, /audits/{id}) was NOT performed this iteration — main agent confirmed frontend is unchanged in V1.2; if they touch shared imports, run iteration_1/iteration_2 frontend Playwright suites.
